form.formComment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but he has solid credentials over this track and distance. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but he has solid credentials over this track and distance. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels at the 200m mark, galloped awkwardly and lost momentum.
Nearing the 100m appeared to put in some awkward strides.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 350m at Goulburn. Likely to find this a bit tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 350m at Goulburn. Likely to find this a bit tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn came together.
Was hampered in the first turn, losing ground.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh on April 9 over 324m at this track behind Audrey's Magic, beaten 8 lengths (18.03) in a Grade 5. Likely to struggle this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh on April 9 over 324m at this track behind Audrey's Magic, beaten 8 lengths (18.03) in a Grade 5. Likely to struggle this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and checked leaving the back straight.

form.formComment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fifth (22.90) at Maitland over 400m. Is a danger.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Started big odds last time but hit the ground running with a slick early split, giving a sight but fading out of it to finish fifth (22.90) at Maitland over 400m. Is a danger.

form.formComment: Had a low draw last time over 324m at this track but was in traffic and failed to finish. Returns here after a three-and-a-half months spell. Worth following up here fresh.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had a low draw last time over 324m at this track but was in traffic and failed to finish. Returns here after a three-and-a-half months spell. Worth following up here fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the 200m mark lost momentum and failed to finish.
Tightened for room, came together at the 100m mark and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last outing finished 6th on March 26 over 324m at this track behind Magic Mania beaten 6 lengths (17.88) in a Grade 5. Well placed and among the chances here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last outing finished 6th on March 26 over 324m at this track behind Magic Mania beaten 6 lengths (17.88) in a Grade 5. Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.47) at this track in a Mix 3/4, finishing seventh and beaten 10 lengths. Goes very well off the draw boasting five wins and two places from 11 starts. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the home straight was forced wide.
Checked who was crowded for room and lost momentum.
